title: Fuel crisis highlights the Pacific's overdependency on fossil fuels
description: The remoteness of the Pacific islands, and the absence of natural resources leaves them more vulnerable than most, and particularly when fuel supplies run short.

title: Amsterdam ban on fossil fuel & meat adverts won’t be enforced until 2027
description: A ban on public advertisements for meat, flying vacations, gas contracts, and fossil-fuel-power

title: Belize Archaeology Symposium to mark 20th Anniversary honoring archaeology research
description: By Zoila Palma: This year, the Belize Archaeology Symposium will mark its 20th anniversary with a symposium to be held from July 1 to 3, 2026 at the Bedran Hall, San Ignacio Resort Hotel. For two decades, this symposium has brought together researchers, students, and the public to share knowledge, discoveries, and stories from Belize’s [...] The post Belize Archaeology Symposium to mark 20th Anniversary honoring archaeology research appeared first on Belize News and Opinion on www.breakingbelizenews.com .

title: Preserving ancient Olympia’s Roman legacy
description: Culture Minister Lina Mendoni has inaugurated restoration works on three Roman monuments at the ancient Olympia archaeological site.

title: High Commission of Sri Lanka and Partner Missions, with Punjab Archaeology Department, Mark Vesak Day at Dharmarajika Stupa, Taxila.
description: The High Commission of Sri Lanka in Islamabad, in collaboration with the diplomatic missions of Nepal, Thailand, Vietnam, and Myanmar, and with the generous support of the Punjab Archaeology Department of Pakistan, organized a commemorative event to mark Vesak Day under the title “Buddha Jayanthi Celebrations 2026.” The ceremony was held at the historic Dharmarajika [...] The post High Commission of Sri Lanka and Partner Missions, with Punjab Archaeology Department, Mark Vesak Day at Dharmarajika Stupa, Taxila. appeared first on Daily The Patriot .
